channel.title: Digi International Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Digi International Inc. (digi).

item.title: CVE-2026-12948 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the web management interface of the Digi PortServer TS, Digi One SP, Digi One SP IA, and Digi One IA allows a remote, authenticated administrator to inject script into certain system configuration…

item.title: CVE-2026-12352 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Incorrect Authorization
item.description: This vulnerability allows an unauthenticated actor to bypass authentication and gain access to restricted resources on the device.

item.title: CVE-2025-13319 · 8.8 HIGH — Authenticated SQL injection in API - Digi On-Prem Manager
item.description: An injection vulnerability has been discovered in the API feature in Digi On-Prem Manager, enabling an attacker with valid API tokens to inject SQL via crafted input. The API is not enabled by default, and a valid API token is required to perform the…

item.title: CVE-2025-3659 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Improper authentication handling for Digi PortServer TS; Digi One SP, SP IA, IA; Digi One IAP
item.description: Improper authentication handling was identified in a set of HTTP POST requests affecting the following product families: * Digi PortServer TS - prior to and including 82000747_AA, build date 06/17/2022 * Digi One SP/Digi One SP IA/Digi One IA - prior…
